supporting_evidence.raw_content:
Full Stack Developer
Image 1: Bdeo logo
   Equipo 
   Ofertas de trabajo 
   Ofertas de trabajo
   >
    Full Stack Developer 
Full Stack Developer
   Indefinido 
   Tiempo completo 
   Híbrido (28029, Madrid, Madrid, España) 
   Technology 
🚀 Are you ready to build technology that scales globally and transforms the future of AI-powered visual intelligence?
At Bdeo, we’re on a mission to reshape how insurance and fleet companies operate around the world through cutting-edge AI solutions. As we continue our international growth, we’re looking for a talented and product-minded Full Stack Engineer based in Spain, eager to build scalable solutions with a global impact.
If you enjoy working across the stack, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams, and turning complex problems into elegant, high-performing software in a fast-growing international scale-up, this might be your next challenge 🌍💻
🔝 About the role
As a Full Stack Developer at Bdeo, your mission is to design, develop, and maintain robust and scalable web applications that enhance our innovative platform. You will work in an AI-first development environment, where artificial intelligence tools are a core part of the daily workflow, helping us build better software faster and with higher quality.
You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality solutions in an AI-focused product, ensuring optimal performance, maintainability, and an excellent user experience. Your ability to effectively leverage AI tools throughout the entire development lifecycle will be key to the success of our projects.
Key Responsibilities:
   💻Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using modern front-end and back-end technologies.
   🤝Collaborate with designers, product managers, and other engineers to deliver high-quality, user-centric solutions.
   🤖Use AI tools on a daily basis to support coding, refactoring, debugging, test generation, and code reviews.
   🔎Apply critical thinking to evaluate AI-generated outputs, identifying errors, edge cases, and improvement opportunities.
   🔄Delegate repetitive or low-value tasks to AI tools to maximize focus on complex and impactful problems.
   ⚒️Maintain and evolve existing software by adding new features, improving quality, and fixing bugs.
   📐Follow and promote best development practices, including clean code, testing, documentation, and code reviews.
👉🏾 About you
Must have:
   ✔️3+ years of experience in web application development with JavaScript.
   ⚒️Strong knowledge of Angular, TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3.
   🔧Experience developing back-end services with Node.js and NoSQL databases.
   🧪Experience with unit testing and quality-focused development.
   📐Solid understanding of design patterns and clean architecture principles.
   🔄Comfortable working with Git in collaborative environments.
   🤖Daily, hands-on experience using AI-powered development tools throughout the full development lifecycle.
   🧠Ability to effectively use AI for code generation, refactoring, test creation, and code reviews, while maintaining ownership and responsibility for the final result.
   🔍Strong critical mindset to assess, validate, and improve AI-generated outputs.
   🗣️Excellent communication skills in both Spanish and English.
Nice to have:
   ☁️Experience with AWS or cloud-based infrastructures.
   🚀Familiarity with agile methodologies and iterative product development.
   🔄Experience with continuous integration and delivery pipelines.
   💉Familiarity with dependency injection.
   ⚙️Solid understanding of OpenAPI or, at least, good practices for designing RESTful APIs.
   🤖Curious, proactive, and eager to explore new AI-driven ways of working and integrate them into your workflow.
   🔊Willingness and ability to share AI best practices and workflows with the rest of the team.
About Us
📡At Bdeo, our mission is to empower the insurance and fleet management industries through cutting-edge Visual Intelligence. Our AI-powered technology, accessible via smartphone, allows for remote analysis and detection of vehicle damage, providing triage and cost estimates that help companies streamline and optimize underwriting and claims management processes.
We focus primarily on Motor Solutions, while also applying our Visual Intelligence to selected Property use cases.
Our recent achievements:
   Operating in +30 countries and expanding, with a multicultural team of #Bdoers representing over 14 nationalities.
   Recognitions: AI Fintech Global 2023, FinTech Global’s Insurtech100 in 2023, Wired's Hottest Startups in Europe and among the top 10 most relevant startups in Madrid in 2023, and ITC DIA Europe top 100 insurtechs to watch in 2024.
   Additional honors: Claims Excellence Awards 2024 (Nominee), Forbes Spain’s 2024 list of 100 Most Creative People in Business featuring Julio Pernía and Bdeo, and recognized among the World’s Top Insurtech Companies 2024 by CNBC and Statista.
Our growth is backed by top-tier investors, including Wayra and Telefónica Seguros through Íope Ventures, Hollard, Armilar, and CDTI, alongside returning investors K Fund and Blackfin—and we couldn’t be more excited for the journey ahead!
Our Values:
   💡 We think BIG and are BOLD
   🏃 We always go the extra mile
   💌 We genuinely CARE about each other
   📡 We stay laser-focused on customer success
🤖About the Process
1.   Conversation with our People & Culture Manager
2.   Practical exercise
3.   A chat with our Engineering Lead
4.   A last conversation with our VP Technology
5.   If all goes well… we will send you an offer!
🎁 Why You'll Love Working with Us!
🏝️ Vacation & Time Off:
   Recharge Fully: Enjoy 23 vacation days plus all Spanish public holidays.
   Extra Days for Special Moments: Paid time off on December 24th and 31st, and yes, we celebrate you with a day off on your birthday! (Just be sure to bring a fantastic birthday cake to share 😉.)
⏳ Flexible Work Options:
   Own Your Schedule: Start anytime between 8 am and 10 am, wrap up between 5 pm and 7 pm, and on Fridays (and 20 summer days), dive into the weekend early with an 8 am to 3 pm finish.
   Home Comforts: Work from home three days a week, plus enjoy six full weeks remote per year.
👾 Awesome Perks:
   Health is Wealth: Private medical and dental insurance (Adeslas) for peace of mind.
   Flexible Spending: Meal, transport, training, and kindergarten benefits through Cobee.
   Office Treats: Fuel your day with office snacks—think fruit, cookies, tea, and coffee, all on us!
📚 Learning & Growth:
   Invest in Yourself: An annual budget for books, courses, events, or anything else to keep you growing.
   Internal Knowledge Sharing: Access training sessions that bring the team closer and up to speed on the latest industry insights.
🌟 Extra Goodies:
   Career Momentum: From new learning to career growth, you’ll find plenty of ways to advance and make a significant impact in an industry-transforming company.
   A Dream Team: Join a passionate crew that’s all about revolutionizing the insurance industry!
Bdeo is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status.

Preferencias 
[x] 
Las cookies de preferencias permiten que un sitio web recuerde información que cambia el comportamiento o el aspecto del sitio web, como el idioma o el país.

supporting_evidence.title: About Bdeo - The power to change insurance industry
supporting_evidence.snippet:
Image 12Image 13
Get to know us a little better
Bdeo was founded in 2017 by Julio Pernía, an entrepreneur with a lot of experience in building B2B Saas companies within the insurance industry. Later, Ruth Puente joined as founder, and little by little more people joined the team, until we became what we are today, a multicultural team based in Spain and Mexico, with extensive experience in the insurance industry.
The team grows and strengthens, on the one hand, with the support of several of the most important European venture capital funds in the Fintech & Insurtech field. On the other hand, with the fighting spirit of all the members of the team, who work every day to strengthen the links between insurers and their clients.
Our values
Think big & be bold
dreaming of a grand Bdeo. [...] Our values
Think big & be bold
dreaming of a grand Bdeo.
Always go the extra mile
seeking excellence.
We care about each other
and grow together.
Laser-focused on customer success
building a strong relationship.
Image 15Image 16
Do you want to be part of the Bdeo team?
Do not hesitate to contact us, we want to meet you.
Join the team

supporting_evidence.raw_content:
Bdeo Passes the 50 Client Mark

Bdeo, the company specialising in Visual Intelligence that optimises and automates insurance processes, ended last year with 50 clients in its portfolio. This growth has allowed the company to expand its presence to three continents, including Europe, Latin America and Africa, as well as in more than 25 countries, five more than a year ago. It currently has offices and/or representation in Spain, Mexico, the United Kingdom, France and Italy.
Commitment to the Spanish insurance market
More than half of all car insurance subscriptions in Spain are now processed using Bdeo’s technology. This milestone was reached in 2022, with Bdeo partnering with 8 of the top 10 motor insurers in Spain.
The company’s main clients in Spain include Mapfre, Mutua Madrileña, Zurich, AXA, Reale, Admiral, Generali, Catalana Occidente, Lagun Aro, Santalucía, Verti, Kutxabank Seguros, Liberty, Zurich and Mussap.
Transforming insurance processes in Latin America
In Latin America, Bdeo’s technology has also brought significant evolution to the insurance sector. It has helped reduce policy underwriting inspection times to less than 5 minutes; reduced inspection times for small claims to less than 8 minutes, and has taken economic claims estimation times from 40 minutes to 15 minutes.
This has enabled total repair times to be reduced from 24 hours in best-case scenarios to 5 hours or less. Bdeo’s customers in the region include Allianz, Banorte, BBVA, BCI, Cesvi, Chubb, HDI, La Caja, Mapfre, Asistencia, Seguros Atlas and Zurich. Some of these clients are already using Bdeo’s technology to cover more than 60% of valuations.

The Bdeo team
Doubling the number of processed claims
In 2022, Bdeo’s Artificial Intelligence solutions processed more than 1.5 million cases, double the amount processed during the previous year.
This increase in activity, together with a growing international presence and new achievements in customer service, resulted in Bdeo being recognised as a top 100 Insurtech by Fintech Global, inclusion in Silicon Valley’s Plug&Play programme, and 4YFN awards nomination.
Breakthrough solutions for homes and fleets
In 2022, Bdeo introduced new breakthrough solutions. Following the success of its solution for motor insurers, the company launched a new Artificial Intelligence solution for home insurers that enables the detection and analysis of damp damage and glass damage.
In addition, Bdeo launched Visual De-Fleeting, a comprehensive AI solution that allows fleet companies to optimise their time managing and evaluating large fleets of vehicles. The solution enables fleet managers to assess any vehicle’s condition in seconds, directly from the user’s own mobile device, and can be applied to leasing, renting, subscription, car sharing or rent-a-car business models.
Visual Intelligence: Using AI to assess damage and estimate costs
Bdeo continues to enhance its core Visual Intelligence technology, a specific type of Artificial Intelligence that helps collect visual evidence of vehicle or home damage via any mobile device, then analyse it and estimate policy rates or repair costs in a matter of seconds.
Visual Intelligence helps to automate the underwriting and claims management processes for auto and home insurance companies, as well as inspection processes for fleet management companies, drastically reducing processing times from weeks to minutes. As a result, companies can minimise friction, increase customer satisfaction and reduce operating costs.

Key Usecases

The Challenge:  Before Metabase, Bdeo.io used Redash, but many of the non-technical team members struggled with Redash’s user interface and its limitations.
The Solution:  Bdeo needed a platform that could run SQL, but that could also create interactive queries for non-experts. They wanted to build dashboards that told good stories, and wanted a wide choice of visualizations and formats to help tell those stories.
The Results:  Metabase made it easier for Bdeo teams to access their data and make better decisions.

The Visual Intelligence technology developed by Bdeo helps insurance companies automate certain tasks in their underwriting and claims management processes. This allows insurers to shorten their processes, save time and costs, and speed up decision-making to offer a better experience to policyholders. Currently, 48 companies in more than 20 countries use Bdeo’s technology in their processes. Bdeo has a team of 70 people, about 50% of whom are technical teams (data and tech).
Why Metabase?
Bdeo generates a lot of data, from customers, product, artificial intelligence models, etc, and all this information is stored in a relational database to be able to perform queries on structured data. They were looking for a platform for querying and visualizing their data so they could answer questions, spot trends, and monitor the behavior of their data (operational, financial, marketing, and data science).
The data
All this data is directly anonymized, formatted, and propagated from their transactional databases (DynamoDB) to their relational analytical databases (PostgreSQL) following an event-driven approach (triggered with any modification and using AWS Lambda for data propagation).
How Bdeo team uses Metabase
With Metabase, Bdeo built dashboards for:
The main teams that make the most use of Metabase are the data, product, and customer success teams, but the marketing, sales, and finance teams use Metabase as well.
Questions include:
Data team
Product team
Customer success:
The data team makes greater use of SQL queries, as raw SQL offers deeper customization for more complex results; however, the query builder is very helpful for simplifying the query for other teams to explore.
The results
The main advantage of using Metabase is that it has connected the different teams through all the information generated by the company.
“Many of Metabase’s features are remarkable, but we could highlight the variety of visualizations and their customization available for queries.”, - says Javier.
Metabase offers a dynamic SQL query creation interface with the use of variables, snippets, and options to review table information interactively. This SQL editor has allowed people outside the data team to become more interested in how to query data and improve their SQL skills to meet their primary needs.
Javier’s Advice for others
Pay attention to all the features of Metabase’s product before getting crazy generating queries. For instance, the Snippets can help you avoid constantly repeating parts of the queries, and the variable filters can help you generalize queries and make them cross-functional.
Metabase allows you to organize questions and dashboards with collections, so a collections structure by area and project will make it easier for people to find what they’re looking for. You can also mark collections as official, which is important to differentiate validated results. You should put the same effort in extracting data insights as you do in organizing, sharing, and communicating them in an understandable way for the different departments involved in your company.

Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer. 
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Performance Cookies
[x] Performance Cookies 
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Functional Cookies
[x] Functional Cookies 
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

Key Usecases

The Challenge:  Before Metabase, Bdeo.io used Redash, but many of the non-technical team members struggled with Redash’s user interface and its limitations.
The Solution:  Bdeo needed a platform that could run SQL, but that could also create interactive queries for non-experts. They wanted to build dashboards that told good stories, and wanted a wide choice of visualizations and formats to help tell those stories.
The Results:  Metabase made it easier for Bdeo teams to access their data and make better decisions.

The Visual Intelligence technology developed by Bdeo helps insurance companies automate certain tasks in their underwriting and claims management processes. This allows insurers to shorten their processes, save time and costs, and speed up decision-making to offer a better experience to policyholders. Currently, 48 companies in more than 20 countries use Bdeo’s technology in their processes. Bdeo has a team of 70 people, about 50% of whom are technical teams (data and tech).
Why Metabase?
Bdeo generates a lot of data, from customers, product, artificial intelligence models, etc, and all this information is stored in a relational database to be able to perform queries on structured data. They were looking for a platform for querying and visualizing their data so they could answer questions, spot trends, and monitor the behavior of their data (operational, financial, marketing, and data science).
The data
All this data is directly anonymized, formatted, and propagated from their transactional databases (DynamoDB) to their relational analytical databases (PostgreSQL) following an event-driven approach (triggered with any modification and using AWS Lambda for data propagation).
How Bdeo team uses Metabase
With Metabase, Bdeo built dashboards for:
The main teams that make the most use of Metabase are the data, product, and customer success teams, but the marketing, sales, and finance teams use Metabase as well.
Questions include:
Data team
Product team
Customer success:
The data team makes greater use of SQL queries, as raw SQL offers deeper customization for more complex results; however, the query builder is very helpful for simplifying the query for other teams to explore.
The results
The main advantage of using Metabase is that it has connected the different teams through all the information generated by the company.
“Many of Metabase’s features are remarkable, but we could highlight the variety of visualizations and their customization available for queries.”, - says Javier.
Metabase offers a dynamic SQL query creation interface with the use of variables, snippets, and options to review table information interactively. This SQL editor has allowed people outside the data team to become more interested in how to query data and improve their SQL skills to meet their primary needs.
Javier’s Advice for others
Pay attention to all the features of Metabase’s product before getting crazy generating queries. For instance, the Snippets can help you avoid constantly repeating parts of the queries, and the variable filters can help you generalize queries and make them cross-functional.
Metabase allows you to organize questions and dashboards with collections, so a collections structure by area and project will make it easier for people to find what they’re looking for. You can also mark collections as official, which is important to differentiate validated results. You should put the same effort in extracting data insights as you do in organizing, sharing, and communicating them in an understandable way for the different departments involved in your company.

Our take
Bdeo automates the analysis of visual evidence of damage to cars, homes and vehicles for the purposes of insurance claims. The technology has been used by ride share and taxi fleets alongside companies as large as lock company Chubb and Italian financial services provider Generali. In it’s native Spain, Bdeo is used by more than 50% of motor insurance companies and 8 of the top 10 motor insurers
Automating the process of identifying damage through computer vision technology takes time out of insurance claims processing and results in quicker decisions being made on the insurer side. AI has been predicted to transform the insurance sector by McKinsey & Company, and it’s no surprise that Bdeo has enjoyed capital funding to the sum of almost $15 million since founding in 2016. It’s 2023 VC will be used to expand its operations, but with 25 countries already under its belt, this AI insurance analyser is only headed in positive directions

Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer. 
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Performance Cookies
[x] Performance Cookies 
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Functional Cookies
[x] Functional Cookies 
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Targeting Cookies
[x] Targeting Cookies 
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

supporting_evidence.title: About Bdeo - The power to change insurance industry
supporting_evidence.snippet:
Image 12Image 13
Get to know us a little better
Bdeo was founded in 2017 by Julio Pernía, an entrepreneur with a lot of experience in building B2B Saas companies within the insurance industry. Later, Ruth Puente joined as founder, and little by little more people joined the team, until we became what we are today, a multicultural team based in Spain and Mexico, with extensive experience in the insurance industry.
The team grows and strengthens, on the one hand, with the support of several of the most important European venture capital funds in the Fintech & Insurtech field. On the other hand, with the fighting spirit of all the members of the team, who work every day to strengthen the links between insurers and their clients.
Our values
Think big & be bold
dreaming of a grand Bdeo. [...] Our values

Always go the extra mile
seeking excellence.
We care about each other
and grow together.

building a strong relationship.

Password recovery Recover your password your email Search Magazine Interviews Re-/Launch Funding Acquisitions Other Stuff Know-How Summit Event Overview Exhibition Options Sponsorship Options Get Tickets Job Board Job Board Post a Job Insights Startup Sourcing Premium Reports Podcast Database Startup Database Investor Database About us Mission / Team Advertising Our Newsletter – CLUB – Register Now Log In CLUB Benefits Search Magazine Interviews Re-/Launch Funding Acquisitions Other Stuff Know-How Summit Event Overview Exhibition Options Sponsorship Options Get Tickets Job Board Job Board Post a Job Insights Startup Sourcing Premium Reports Podcast Database Startup Database Investor Database About us Mission / Team Advertising Our Newsletter – CLUB – Register Now Log In CLUB Benefits Search Home Funding Barcelona-based Alinia raises €2.2 million pre-seed to enable safe deployment of genAI Funding Spain-Startups Barcelona-based Alinia raises €2.2 million pre-seed to enable safe deployment of genAI By Stefano De Marzo June 5, 2024 Share Facebook Twitter WhatsApp Linkedin Alinia AI , an alignment platform enabling companies’ safe and controlled deployment of generative AI, guided by their policies and business preferences, announces a successful €2.2 million pre-seed funding round. Speedinvest and Precursor led the round with participation from KFund and notable angels including Clem Délangue & Thom Wolf (Hugging Face Co-Founders), Tom Preston (GitHub Co-Founder), Xavier Amatriain (Google Core AI VP), and Oriol Vinyals (Google DeepMind VP of Research). Significant adoption of generative AI is underway with spending set to hit $143 billion by 2027, but its rapid adoption comes with significant challenges. The problem? Managing control and safety in the face of risks to prevent inappropriate or brand-damaging content. Additionally, navigating upcoming regulatory efforts like the EU AI Act, Biden´s Executive Order, or Canada´s Bill C-27, which demand rigorous safety checks and clear documentation, also adds hurdles to mass enterprise adoption. Evaluating the performance and reliability of generative AI applications from both safety and business dimensions is a top obstacle for the enterprise today. This is especially challenging for companies when leveraging advanced techniques like fine-tuning and RAG, maintaining LLM versions, and coordinating across teams including machine learning, governance, and business domain experts. “The technology is not production-ready for business scenarios. Enterprise leaders are rightfully afraid of making headlines because their generative AI applications go rogue. Reputational harm keeps them up at night,” said Ariadna Font Llitjós, co-founder & CEO of Alinia. “Using a process known as Alignment, we ensure AI systems adhere to expected behaviors, policies, and regulatory requirements – helping enterprises seize the promise of this new technology while minimizing the risks and potential harm.” Founded in 2023, Alinia Alignment Platform aims to provide an integral AI governance approach – which currently requires multiple tools – ranging from evaluation and real-time monitoring to cutting-edge optimization techniques, coupled with documentation features facilitating compliance at every stage of the LLM lifecycle. Enabling customers to have clear and accurate evidence of how LLM-powered applications behave in different enterprise scenarios, for specific tasks, and abiding by specific rules, is the first step towards alignment for the enterprise. “ In my experience at Hugging Face, governance and safety aspects of LLM development require an incredible amount of time and effort. But when you are about to release a foundation model that will be used millions of times, governance and safety are non-negotiables ,” addedCarlos Muñoz Ferrandis, co-founder & COO. With an initial focus on enabling subject-matter experts to guide and validate the performance and safety of their generative AI applications, Alinia will use the funding to hire additional talent to build the Alinia Alignment Platform to create an end-to-end alignment process focused on safety and regulatory requirements – enabling safe and inclusive use of generative AI across LLM modalities and languages. Fred Hagenauer, Partner with Speedinvest, said: “ Ari and Carlos have some of the best profiles we´ve seen to tackle the alignment problem in the generative AI space. Their experience and knowledge of the early days of enterprise AI, RAI, and the LLM governance required today is something truly unique. For us, it was a no-brainer to be the first ones to support them.” Charles Hudson, Managing Partner with Precursor Ventures, commented: “Alinia brings the confidence that enterprise lacks today to deploy generative AI in a safe and trustworthy way. Being able to control and steer these powerful agents is such a challenge, but they have the experience needed and are willing to take it head-on.” Tags alinia ai barcelona gen ai kfund pre-seed round precursor ventures SpeedInvest Share Facebook Twitter WhatsApp Linkedin Previous article Manchester-based Ittybit snaps €1.7 million to make robust media workflows accessible to developers Next article Emerging Trends: Europe’s next big tech opportunities Stefano De Marzo Stefano De Marzo is the former Head of News at EU-Startups. He has been extensively covering startups, venture capital and innovation ecosystems, including contributions to numerous publications such as Sifted, Entrepreneur and Forbes. Through his work as an editor and writer, he continues to shape the narrative surrounding the best stories of the tech world. FundingSpain-Startups
Madrid-based startup Shakers raises €14 million to help businesses integrate teams of specialised talent with AI
By David Cendon Garcia
Share
FacebookTwitterWhatsAppLinkedin
HRTech startup Shakers, a Spanish workforce management platform connecting companies with tech freelancers, today announced its €14 million Series A funding round in order to expand double its headcount.
The funding round was led by Partech, with further investment from KFund, Brighteye Ventures, Athos Capital and Wayra.
Héctor Mata, Shakers CEO, said: “The convergence of AI and independent talent is not a trend – it’s a new operating model. Demand for specialised technical talent is soaring, but the traditional outsourcing model hasn’t evolved in over decades. With Shakers, we are setting a new standard for hiring: our platform acts as the new operating system for performance-driven freelancers — giving them the same benefits as traditional roles, while offering companies the agility to innovate faster. As we expand across Europe, we’re building the infrastructure layer that powers the AI-infused workplace of the future.”
Founded in 2021, Shakers is a workforce orchestration platform that connects businesses with specialised tech freelancers and autonomous AI agents. Founded by four serial entrepreneurs – Héctor Mata (CEO), Nico de Luis (COO), Adrián de Pedro (CPO) and Jaime Castillo (CRO) – with backgrounds in AI and software development, and first-hand experience in both finding freelance work and hiring talent.
With over 10,000 vetted freelancers and 450+ client companies including Microsoft, Inditex and Telefónica, Shakers aims to empower a new generation of performance-driven freeworkers with integrated services such as banking, insurance and productivity tools – all within its all-in-one Freelancer OS.
The company has grown over 6x in revenue over the past year, and is aiming to continue on its growth trajectory. 60% of their revenue reportedly comes from recurring customers and 30% of revenue generated organically from other European markets.
Shakers envisions a future of work where businesses can easily onboard specialised teams of tech freelancers and autonomous AI agents to collaborate, experiment, and drive new technological capabilities via complex and long-term projects. The platform empowers businesses and freelancers to automate their most “frustrating” workflow challenges and upgrade their productivity skills, promoting quick and effective results.
According to data provided by Shakers, this comes at a time when the traditional IT outsourcing landscape is being reshaped, with the European market projected to grow from €180 billion to over €280 billion by 2030 as demand shifts toward more flexible, high-skill talent solutions.
Shakers plans to double its team size in the next year to facilitate their growth, while expanding its AI agent integrations for freelancers and businesses. By 2027, Shakers will reportedly have orchestrated over 10,000 hybrid projects.
Simone Riva, Partech Senior Principal, said: “At Partech, we believe that while AI is reshaping the way we work, exceptional talent will always be at the heart of the future of work. From our very first conversation, it was clear the Shakers team is building something special — a fast, intuitive platform tailored to the flexible workforce of tomorrow. They’re redefining how companies find, hire, and collaborate with top talent. We’re proud to back this visionary team and are excited to support them as they scale across Spain, Europe, and beyond.”
As part of Shakers’ community of 10,000+ tech freelancers, they will enjoy the same benefits as traditional employment, including embedded services for banking, insurance, productivity and more, alongside the flexibility, freedom and incentives of self-employment.
According to Shakers, their technology goes beyond just sourcing – it validates talent end-to-end, assessing both hard and soft skills, experience, and cultural fit through more than 1,000 data points.
Integrated with Shakers Verified, their pre-vetting tool, the platform eliminates the need for early interviews and technical tests, delivering ready-to-work talent from day one. This means that companies can potentially go from idea to fully assembled team in minutes.

36 Best Ai Startups in Spain to Watch in 2026
The Definitive Seedtable Ranking of Ai Startups in Spain
We track 71,000+ companies and rank them dynamically using our Seedtable Score – a score that uses quantitative and qualitative data points to signal the momentum behind a company. We then monitor the list manually leveraging our expertise as founders and investors.
There are 36 start-ups with an aggregate funding of $740.3m. The average funding per company in this subset is $20.6m.
The list encompasses 404 founders. 1863 executives. It includes data on 2267 professionals within these filtered companies.
Last update to the database: Mar 17, 2026. See changelog.

Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer. 
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Performance Cookies
[x] Performance Cookies 
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Functional Cookies
[x] Functional Cookies 
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Targeting Cookies
[x] Targeting Cookies 
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. supporting_evidence.raw_content:
Full Stack Developer
Image 1: Bdeo logo
   Equipo 
   Ofertas de trabajo 
   Ofertas de trabajo
   >
    Full Stack Developer 
Full Stack Developer
   Indefinido 
   Tiempo completo 
   Híbrido (28029, Madrid, Madrid, España) 
   Technology 
🚀 Are you ready to build technology that scales globally and transforms the future of AI-powered visual intelligence?
At Bdeo, we’re on a mission to reshape how insurance and fleet companies operate around the world through cutting-edge AI solutions. As we continue our international growth, we’re looking for a talented and product-minded Full Stack Engineer based in Spain, eager to build scalable solutions with a global impact.
If you enjoy working across the stack, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams, and turning complex problems into elegant, high-performing software in a fast-growing international scale-up, this might be your next challenge 🌍💻
🔝 About the role
As a Full Stack Developer at Bdeo, your mission is to design, develop, and maintain robust and scalable web applications that enhance our innovative platform. You will work in an AI-first development environment, where artificial intelligence tools are a core part of the daily workflow, helping us build better software faster and with higher quality.
You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality solutions in an AI-focused product, ensuring optimal performance, maintainability, and an excellent user experience. Your ability to effectively leverage AI tools throughout the entire development lifecycle will be key to the success of our projects.
Key Responsibilities:
   💻Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using modern front-end and back-end technologies.
   🤝Collaborate with designers, product managers, and other engineers to deliver high-quality, user-centric solutions.
   🤖Use AI tools on a daily basis to support coding, refactoring, debugging, test generation, and code reviews.
   🔎Apply critical thinking to evaluate AI-generated outputs, identifying errors, edge cases, and improvement opportunities.
   🔄Delegate repetitive or low-value tasks to AI tools to maximize focus on complex and impactful problems.
   ⚒️Maintain and evolve existing software by adding new features, improving quality, and fixing bugs.
   📐Follow and promote best development practices, including clean code, testing, documentation, and code reviews.
👉🏾 About you
Must have:
   ✔️3+ years of experience in web application development with JavaScript.
   ⚒️Strong knowledge of Angular, TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3.
   🔧Experience developing back-end services with Node.js and NoSQL databases.
   🧪Experience with unit testing and quality-focused development.
   📐Solid understanding of design patterns and clean architecture principles.
   🔄Comfortable working with Git in collaborative environments.
   🤖Daily, hands-on experience using AI-powered development tools throughout the full development lifecycle.
   🧠Ability to effectively use AI for code generation, refactoring, test creation, and code reviews, while maintaining ownership and responsibility for the final result.
   🔍Strong critical mindset to assess, validate, and improve AI-generated outputs.
   🗣️Excellent communication skills in both Spanish and English.
Nice to have:
   ☁️Experience with AWS or cloud-based infrastructures.
   🚀Familiarity with agile methodologies and iterative product development.
   🔄Experience with continuous integration and delivery pipelines.
   💉Familiarity with dependency injection.
   ⚙️Solid understanding of OpenAPI or, at least, good practices for designing RESTful APIs.
   🤖Curious, proactive, and eager to explore new AI-driven ways of working and integrate them into your workflow.
   🔊Willingness and ability to share AI best practices and workflows with the rest of the team.
About Us
📡At Bdeo, our mission is to empower the insurance and fleet management industries through cutting-edge Visual Intelligence. Our AI-powered technology, accessible via smartphone, allows for remote analysis and detection of vehicle damage, providing triage and cost estimates that help companies streamline and optimize underwriting and claims management processes.
We focus primarily on Motor Solutions, while also applying our Visual Intelligence to selected Property use cases.
Our recent achievements:
   Operating in +30 countries and expanding, with a multicultural team of #Bdoers representing over 14 nationalities.
   Recognitions: AI Fintech Global 2023, FinTech Global’s Insurtech100 in 2023, Wired's Hottest Startups in Europe and among the top 10 most relevant startups in Madrid in 2023, and ITC DIA Europe top 100 insurtechs to watch in 2024.
   Additional honors: Claims Excellence Awards 2024 (Nominee), Forbes Spain’s 2024 list of 100 Most Creative People in Business featuring Julio Pernía and Bdeo, and recognized among the World’s Top Insurtech Companies 2024 by CNBC and Statista.
Our growth is backed by top-tier investors, including Wayra and Telefónica Seguros through Íope Ventures, Hollard, Armilar, and CDTI, alongside returning investors K Fund and Blackfin—and we couldn’t be more excited for the journey ahead!
Our Values:
   💡 We think BIG and are BOLD
   🏃 We always go the extra mile
   💌 We genuinely CARE about each other
   📡 We stay laser-focused on customer success
🤖About the Process
1.   Conversation with our People & Culture Manager
2.   Practical exercise
3.   A chat with our Engineering Lead
4.   A last conversation with our VP Technology
5.   If all goes well… we will send you an offer!
🎁 Why You'll Love Working with Us!
🏝️ Vacation & Time Off:
   Recharge Fully: Enjoy 23 vacation days plus all Spanish public holidays.
   Extra Days for Special Moments: Paid time off on December 24th and 31st, and yes, we celebrate you with a day off on your birthday! (Just be sure to bring a fantastic birthday cake to share 😉.)
⏳ Flexible Work Options:
   Own Your Schedule: Start anytime between 8 am and 10 am, wrap up between 5 pm and 7 pm, and on Fridays (and 20 summer days), dive into the weekend early with an 8 am to 3 pm finish.
   Home Comforts: Work from home three days a week, plus enjoy six full weeks remote per year.
👾 Awesome Perks:
   Health is Wealth: Private medical and dental insurance (Adeslas) for peace of mind.
   Flexible Spending: Meal, transport, training, and kindergarten benefits through Cobee.
   Office Treats: Fuel your day with office snacks—think fruit, cookies, tea, and coffee, all on us!
📚 Learning & Growth:
   Invest in Yourself: An annual budget for books, courses, events, or anything else to keep you growing.
   Internal Knowledge Sharing: Access training sessions that bring the team closer and up to speed on the latest industry insights.
🌟 Extra Goodies:
   Career Momentum: From new learning to career growth, you’ll find plenty of ways to advance and make a significant impact in an industry-transforming company.
   A Dream Team: Join a passionate crew that’s all about revolutionizing the insurance industry!
Bdeo is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status.

supporting_evidence.title: About Bdeo - The power to change insurance industry

Image 12Image 13
Get to know us a little better
Bdeo was founded in 2017 by Julio Pernía, an entrepreneur with a lot of experience in building B2B Saas companies within the insurance industry. Later, Ruth Puente joined as founder, and little by little more people joined the team, until we became what we are today, a multicultural team based in Spain and Mexico, with extensive experience in the insurance industry.
The team grows and strengthens, on the one hand, with the support of several of the most important European venture capital funds in the Fintech & Insurtech field. On the other hand, with the fighting spirit of all the members of the team, who work every day to strengthen the links between insurers and their clients.

Get to know us a little better
Bdeo was founded in 2017 by Julio Pernía, an entrepreneur with a lot of experience in building B2B Saas companies within the insurance industry. Later, Ruth Puente joined as founder, and little by little more people joined the team, until we became what we are today, a multicultural team based in Spain and Mexico, with extensive experience in the insurance industry.
The team grows and strengthens, on the one hand, with the support of several of the most important European venture capital funds in the Fintech & Insurtech field. On the other hand, with the fighting spirit of all the members of the team, who work every day to strengthen the links between insurers and their clients.

### Glassdoor (4.2) Image 4: Glassdoor star iconImage 5: Glassdoor star iconImage 6: Glassdoor star iconImage 7: Glassdoor star iconImage 8: Glassdoor star icon
Our take
Bdeo automates the analysis of visual evidence of damage to cars, homes and vehicles for the purposes of insurance claims. The technology has been used by ride share and taxi fleets alongside companies as large as lock company Chubb and Italian financial services provider Generali. In it’s native Spain, Bdeo is used by more than 50% of motor insurance companies and 8 of the top 10 motor insurers
Automating the process of identifying damage through computer vision technology takes time out of insurance claims processing and results in quicker decisions being made on the insurer side. AI has been predicted to transform the insurance sector by McKinsey & Company, and it’s no surprise that Bdeo has enjoyed capital funding to the sum of almost $15 million since founding in 2016. It’s 2023 VC will be used to expand its operations, but with 25 countries already under its belt, this AI insurance analyser is only headed in positive directions

Reduce costes. Acelera procesos.
La Inteligencia Visual de Bdeo permite la captura de imágenes a través de un smartphone, para luego examinarlas y detectar daños y otra información de forma instantánea.
Ofrece una estimación de costes y ayuda a la aseguradora o compañía de flotas a acelerar la toma de decisiones: puede proponer una póliza, realizar un triaje, automatizar el pago de indemnizaciones o agilizar la subida de evidencia adicional desde el taller.
Todo, en cuestión de minutos.

Acelera procesos y reduce el fraude desde la suscripción de un nuevo vehículo hasta el  
cierre de la gestión de un siniestro.

English বাংলা
BDEO Logo
Bangladesh Economics Olympiad
Circular 2026
Get ready for the annual national competition in Economics, Financial Literacy, and Business Case Solving! School, college, and university students are invited to participate for a chance to win national recognition and represent Bangladesh internationally.
Go To Exam
Key Dates & Competition Rounds
 Online Selection Round (MCQ): December 31, 2025 (from 06:00 PM)
 Regional Round - 1: On 3rd January @ Shahjalal University of Science & Technology
 Regional Round - 2: On 10th January @ Rajshahi University
 Regional Round - 3: On 17th January @ Chittagong College
 National Round: 31st January @ Dhaka University (for regional winners and Dhaka participants)
Participants may choose their preferred regional center based on their location.
Prizes & International Opportunities
High School & College Winners
Top-performing students will represent Bangladesh at the International Economics Olympiad (IEO) 2026 in China and other prestigious international events (e.g., World Economics Cup) along with regional and national awards.
University Students
Can compete up to the national level to win exciting regional & national awards and may proceed to a special case competition.
Bangladesh's Success: Since 2019, Team Bangladesh has achieved remarkable success, securing 2 Gold, 10 Silver, and 31 Bronze medals in IEO and the World Economics Cup.
Registration Details
Fee: FREE
Eligibility: School, college, and university students from any discipline
Deadline: December 29, 2025
Register Now
Competition Categories
1
Junior
Up to Grade 9
2
Intermediate
Up to Grade 12
3
Advanced
Undergraduate
Team Selection Process
The path to IEO 2026:
1
Online Selection Round (MCQ)
Selects 300 students for each regional center (Chattogram, Rajshahi, Sylhet), and 500 for the Dhaka & Other Regions round.
2
Regional Round (Theory & MCQ)
Top 60 participants from each regional round will advance to the Dhaka round for the National Competition.
3
National Round (Theory & MCQ)
The top 50 contestants from the school and college levels will proceed to the Team Selection Camp.
4
Team Selection Camp
Focuses on MCQ, Theory, and Business Case Solving. The Top 5 contestants will qualify for the International Economics Olympiad 2026. Other selected participants may compete in the World Economics Cup and Asian Economics Cup.
Preparation Resources
Topics: Economics, Financial literacy, Business case solving
IEO Syllabus & Past Tasks ieo-official.org/prepare BDEO Past Questions & Textbook PDF "Principles of Economics" by N. Gregory Mankiw
Contact Us
For any further inquiries, please feel free to reach out via email or through our Facebook page.
Email: (/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#573e393138793533323817303a363e3b7934383a)
Facebook: facebook.com/BdEO.Official
We look forward to your participation and wish you the best of luck!
Proceed to Registration →

supporting_evidence.title: Bdeo Passes the 50 Client Mark -
supporting_evidence.snippet:
Visual Intelligence helps to automate the underwriting and claims management processes for auto and home insurance companies, as well as inspection processes for fleet management companies, drastically reducing processing times from weeks to minutes. supporting_evidence.raw_content:
Bdeo Passes the 50 Client Mark

Bdeo, the company specialising in Visual Intelligence that optimises and automates insurance processes, ended last year with 50 clients in its portfolio. This growth has allowed the company to expand its presence to three continents, including Europe, Latin America and Africa, as well as in more than 25 countries, five more than a year ago. It currently has offices and/or representation in Spain, Mexico, the United Kingdom, France and Italy.
Commitment to the Spanish insurance market
More than half of all car insurance subscriptions in Spain are now processed using Bdeo’s technology. This milestone was reached in 2022, with Bdeo partnering with 8 of the top 10 motor insurers in Spain.
The company’s main clients in Spain include Mapfre, Mutua Madrileña, Zurich, AXA, Reale, Admiral, Generali, Catalana Occidente, Lagun Aro, Santalucía, Verti, Kutxabank Seguros, Liberty, Zurich and Mussap.
Transforming insurance processes in Latin America
In Latin America, Bdeo’s technology has also brought significant evolution to the insurance sector. It has helped reduce policy underwriting inspection times to less than 5 minutes; reduced inspection times for small claims to less than 8 minutes, and has taken economic claims estimation times from 40 minutes to 15 minutes.
This has enabled total repair times to be reduced from 24 hours in best-case scenarios to 5 hours or less. Bdeo’s customers in the region include Allianz, Banorte, BBVA, BCI, Cesvi, Chubb, HDI, La Caja, Mapfre, Asistencia, Seguros Atlas and Zurich. Some of these clients are already using Bdeo’s technology to cover more than 60% of valuations.

The Bdeo team
Doubling the number of processed claims
In 2022, Bdeo’s Artificial Intelligence solutions processed more than 1.5 million cases, double the amount processed during the previous year.
This increase in activity, together with a growing international presence and new achievements in customer service, resulted in Bdeo being recognised as a top 100 Insurtech by Fintech Global, inclusion in Silicon Valley’s Plug&Play programme, and 4YFN awards nomination.
Breakthrough solutions for homes and fleets
In 2022, Bdeo introduced new breakthrough solutions. Following the success of its solution for motor insurers, the company launched a new Artificial Intelligence solution for home insurers that enables the detection and analysis of damp damage and glass damage.
In addition, Bdeo launched Visual De-Fleeting, a comprehensive AI solution that allows fleet companies to optimise their time managing and evaluating large fleets of vehicles. The solution enables fleet managers to assess any vehicle’s condition in seconds, directly from the user’s own mobile device, and can be applied to leasing, renting, subscription, car sharing or rent-a-car business models.
Visual Intelligence: Using AI to assess damage and estimate costs
Bdeo continues to enhance its core Visual Intelligence technology, a specific type of Artificial Intelligence that helps collect visual evidence of vehicle or home damage via any mobile device, then analyse it and estimate policy rates or repair costs in a matter of seconds.
Visual Intelligence helps to automate the underwriting and claims management processes for auto and home insurance companies, as well as inspection processes for fleet management companies, drastically reducing processing times from weeks to minutes. As a result, companies can minimise friction, increase customer satisfaction and reduce operating costs.

Key Usecases

The Challenge:  Before Metabase, Bdeo.io used Redash, but many of the non-technical team members struggled with Redash’s user interface and its limitations.
The Solution:  Bdeo needed a platform that could run SQL, but that could also create interactive queries for non-experts. They wanted to build dashboards that told good stories, and wanted a wide choice of visualizations and formats to help tell those stories.
The Results:  Metabase made it easier for Bdeo teams to access their data and make better decisions.

The Visual Intelligence technology developed by Bdeo helps insurance companies automate certain tasks in their underwriting and claims management processes. This allows insurers to shorten their processes, save time and costs, and speed up decision-making to offer a better experience to policyholders. Currently, 48 companies in more than 20 countries use Bdeo’s technology in their processes. Bdeo has a team of 70 people, about 50% of whom are technical teams (data and tech).
Why Metabase?
Bdeo generates a lot of data, from customers, product, artificial intelligence models, etc, and all this information is stored in a relational database to be able to perform queries on structured data. They were looking for a platform for querying and visualizing their data so they could answer questions, spot trends, and monitor the behavior of their data (operational, financial, marketing, and data science).
The data
All this data is directly anonymized, formatted, and propagated from their transactional databases (DynamoDB) to their relational analytical databases (PostgreSQL) following an event-driven approach (triggered with any modification and using AWS Lambda for data propagation).
How Bdeo team uses Metabase
With Metabase, Bdeo built dashboards for:
The main teams that make the most use of Metabase are the data, product, and customer success teams, but the marketing, sales, and finance teams use Metabase as well.
Questions include:
Data team
Product team
Customer success:
The data team makes greater use of SQL queries, as raw SQL offers deeper customization for more complex results; however, the query builder is very helpful for simplifying the query for other teams to explore.
The results
The main advantage of using Metabase is that it has connected the different teams through all the information generated by the company.
“Many of Metabase’s features are remarkable, but we could highlight the variety of visualizations and their customization available for queries.”, - says Javier.
Metabase offers a dynamic SQL query creation interface with the use of variables, snippets, and options to review table information interactively. This SQL editor has allowed people outside the data team to become more interested in how to query data and improve their SQL skills to meet their primary needs.
Javier’s Advice for others
Pay attention to all the features of Metabase’s product before getting crazy generating queries. For instance, the Snippets can help you avoid constantly repeating parts of the queries, and the variable filters can help you generalize queries and make them cross-functional.
Metabase allows you to organize questions and dashboards with collections, so a collections structure by area and project will make it easier for people to find what they’re looking for. You can also mark collections as official, which is important to differentiate validated results. You should put the same effort in extracting data insights as you do in organizing, sharing, and communicating them in an understandable way for the different departments involved in your company.

Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer. 
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Performance Cookies
[x] Performance Cookies 
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Functional Cookies
[x] Functional Cookies 
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Targeting Cookies
[x] Targeting Cookies 
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

🚀 Are you ready to build technology that scales globally and transforms the future of AI-powered visual intelligence?

About Us
📡At Bdeo, our mission is to empower the insurance and fleet management industries through cutting-edge Visual Intelligence. Our AI-powered technology, accessible via smartphone, allows for remote analysis and detection of vehicle damage, providing triage and cost estimates that help companies streamline and optimize underwriting and claims management processes.

Full Stack Developer
Image 1: Bdeo logo
   Equipo 
   Ofertas de trabajo 
   Ofertas de trabajo
   >
    Full Stack Developer 
Full Stack Developer
   Indefinido 
   Tiempo completo 
   Híbrido (28029, Madrid, Madrid, España) 
   Technology 
🚀 Are you ready to build technology that scales globally and transforms the future of AI-powered visual intelligence?
At Bdeo, we’re on a mission to reshape how insurance and fleet companies operate around the world through cutting-edge AI solutions. As we continue our international growth, we’re looking for a talented and product-minded Full Stack Engineer based in Spain, eager to build scalable solutions with a global impact.
If you enjoy working across the stack, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams, and turning complex problems into elegant, high-performing software in a fast-growing international scale-up, this might be your next challenge 🌍💻
🔝 About the role
As a Full Stack Developer at Bdeo, your mission is to design, develop, and maintain robust and scalable web applications that enhance our innovative platform. You will work in an AI-first development environment, where artificial intelligence tools are a core part of the daily workflow, helping us build better software faster and with higher quality.
You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality solutions in an AI-focused product, ensuring optimal performance, maintainability, and an excellent user experience. Your ability to effectively leverage AI tools throughout the entire development lifecycle will be key to the success of our projects.
Key Responsibilities:
   💻Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using modern front-end and back-end technologies.
   🤝Collaborate with designers, product managers, and other engineers to deliver high-quality, user-centric solutions.
   🤖Use AI tools on a daily basis to support coding, refactoring, debugging, test generation, and code reviews.
   🔎Apply critical thinking to evaluate AI-generated outputs, identifying errors, edge cases, and improvement opportunities.
   🔄Delegate repetitive or low-value tasks to AI tools to maximize focus on complex and impactful problems.
   ⚒️Maintain and evolve existing software by adding new features, improving quality, and fixing bugs.
   📐Follow and promote best development practices, including clean code, testing, documentation, and code reviews.
👉🏾 About you
Must have:
   ✔️3+ years of experience in web application development with JavaScript.
   ⚒️Strong knowledge of Angular, TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3.
   🔧Experience developing back-end services with Node.js and NoSQL databases.
   🧪Experience with unit testing and quality-focused development.
   📐Solid understanding of design patterns and clean architecture principles.
   🔄Comfortable working with Git in collaborative environments.
   🤖Daily, hands-on experience using AI-powered development tools throughout the full development lifecycle.
   🧠Ability to effectively use AI for code generation, refactoring, test creation, and code reviews, while maintaining ownership and responsibility for the final result.
   🔍Strong critical mindset to assess, validate, and improve AI-generated outputs.
   🗣️Excellent communication skills in both Spanish and English.
Nice to have:
   ☁️Experience with AWS or cloud-based infrastructures.
   🚀Familiarity with agile methodologies and iterative product development.
   🔄Experience with continuous integration and delivery pipelines.
   💉Familiarity with dependency injection.
   ⚙️Solid understanding of OpenAPI or, at least, good practices for designing RESTful APIs.
   🤖Curious, proactive, and eager to explore new AI-driven ways of working and integrate them into your workflow.
   🔊Willingness and ability to share AI best practices and workflows with the rest of the team.
About Us
📡At Bdeo, our mission is to empower the insurance and fleet management industries through cutting-edge Visual Intelligence. Our AI-powered technology, accessible via smartphone, allows for remote analysis and detection of vehicle damage, providing triage and cost estimates that help companies streamline and optimize underwriting and claims management processes.
We focus primarily on Motor Solutions, while also applying our Visual Intelligence to selected Property use cases.
Our recent achievements:
   Operating in +30 countries and expanding, with a multicultural team of #Bdoers representing over 14 nationalities.
   Recognitions: AI Fintech Global 2023, FinTech Global’s Insurtech100 in 2023, Wired's Hottest Startups in Europe and among the top 10 most relevant startups in Madrid in 2023, and ITC DIA Europe top 100 insurtechs to watch in 2024.
   Additional honors: Claims Excellence Awards 2024 (Nominee), Forbes Spain’s 2024 list of 100 Most Creative People in Business featuring Julio Pernía and Bdeo, and recognized among the World’s Top Insurtech Companies 2024 by CNBC and Statista.
Our growth is backed by top-tier investors, including Wayra and Telefónica Seguros through Íope Ventures, Hollard, Armilar, and CDTI, alongside returning investors K Fund and Blackfin—and we couldn’t be more excited for the journey ahead!
Our Values:
   💡 We think BIG and are BOLD
   🏃 We always go the extra mile
   💌 We genuinely CARE about each other
   📡 We stay laser-focused on customer success
🤖About the Process
1.   Conversation with our People & Culture Manager
2.   Practical exercise
3.   A chat with our Engineering Lead
4.   A last conversation with our VP Technology
5.   If all goes well… we will send you an offer!
🎁 Why You'll Love Working with Us!
🏝️ Vacation & Time Off:
   Recharge Fully: Enjoy 23 vacation days plus all Spanish public holidays.
   Extra Days for Special Moments: Paid time off on December 24th and 31st, and yes, we celebrate you with a day off on your birthday! (Just be sure to bring a fantastic birthday cake to share 😉.)
⏳ Flexible Work Options:
   Own Your Schedule: Start anytime between 8 am and 10 am, wrap up between 5 pm and 7 pm, and on Fridays (and 20 summer days), dive into the weekend early with an 8 am to 3 pm finish.
   Home Comforts: Work from home three days a week, plus enjoy six full weeks remote per year.
👾 Awesome Perks:
   Health is Wealth: Private medical and dental insurance (Adeslas) for peace of mind.
   Flexible Spending: Meal, transport, training, and kindergarten benefits through Cobee.
   Office Treats: Fuel your day with office snacks—think fruit, cookies, tea, and coffee, all on us!
📚 Learning & Growth:
   Invest in Yourself: An annual budget for books, courses, events, or anything else to keep you growing.
   Internal Knowledge Sharing: Access training sessions that bring the team closer and up to speed on the latest industry insights.
🌟 Extra Goodies:
   Career Momentum: From new learning to career growth, you’ll find plenty of ways to advance and make a significant impact in an industry-transforming company.
   A Dream Team: Join a passionate crew that’s all about revolutionizing the insurance industry!
Bdeo is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status.

supporting_evidence.title: About Bdeo - The power to change insurance industry
supporting_evidence.snippet:
Image 12Image 13
Get to know us a little better
Bdeo was founded in 2017 by Julio Pernía, an entrepreneur with a lot of experience in building B2B Saas companies within the insurance industry. Later, Ruth Puente joined as founder, and little by little more people joined the team, until we became what we are today, a multicultural team based in Spain and Mexico, with extensive experience in the insurance industry.
The team grows and strengthens, on the one hand, with the support of several of the most important European venture capital funds in the Fintech & Insurtech field. On the other hand, with the fighting spirit of all the members of the team, who work every day to strengthen the links between insurers and their clients.
Our values
Think big & be bold
dreaming of a grand Bdeo. [...] Our values

and grow together.

Solicita una demo y descubre de primera mano todos los beneficios de Bdeo.
Empieza hoy [...] Más de 60 compañías en 25 países ya utilizan Bdeo.
Reduce costes. Acelera procesos.
La Inteligencia Visual de Bdeo permite la captura de imágenes a través de un smartphone, para luego examinarlas y detectar daños y otra información de forma instantánea.
Ofrece una estimación de costes y ayuda a la aseguradora o compañía de flotas a acelerar la toma de decisiones: puede proponer una póliza, realizar un triaje, automatizar el pago de indemnizaciones o agilizar la subida de evidencia adicional desde el taller.
Todo, en cuestión de minutos.
Productos adaptados a cada industria
Aseguradoras de autos
Acelera procesos y reduce el fraude desde la suscripción de un nuevo vehículo hasta el  
cierre de la gestión de un siniestro.
Gestión de siniestrosSuscripción de pólizas [...] Inspección y evaluación de daños en segundos.
Agiliza la toma de decisiones con recomendaciones inteligentes que dan superpoderes a tu equipo. Todo gracias a la tecnología más avanzada de Inteligencia Visual.
Empieza hoy
Nuestra tecnología optimiza los procesos de tu compañía aseguradora o de gestión de flotas para lograr una experiencia de usuario avanzada. Precisión, flexibilidad y fiabilidad  
para ayudarte en tu toma de decisiones y mejorar el ratio combinado.
Tus procesos con Bdeo
Gestión: De 3 semanas a 5 días.
Inspección: De 5 días a 5 minutos.
Reduce hasta un 16% los costes de reparación de siniestros.
Aumenta hasta en un 15% la detección de fraude.
Reduce hasta un 70% los costes directos de suscripción.
